Docs.summary: Specifies the time at which the machine was created.

MemberSignature.Value: public Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.ContainerServiceMachineDriftAction? DriftAction { get; }

Docs.summary: The drift action of the machine. Indicates whether a machine has deviated from its expected state due to changes in managed cluster properties, requiring corrective action.

MemberSignature.Value: public string DriftReason { get; }
.property instance string DriftReason
Public ReadOnly Property DriftReason As String
member this.DriftReason : string

Docs.summary: Reason for machine drift. Provides detailed information on why the machine has drifted. This field is omitted if the machine is up to date.
